welcome.title: A few questions to find out if you can get a <hl>residence permit</hl> in Italy
welcome.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find out which permit you can apply for
welcome.disclaimer: This tool provides general information, not legal advice.

tree.explainer: If you don't have a residence permit, with a few simple questions you'll find out if you can GET a residence permit.
tree.policyNote:
By clicking you accept the S.O.S. permesso policies:
• Before making final decisions, it's always best to seek qualified legal advice
• We do not collect personal data and do not share it with anyone
• We use many masculine words only for simplicity
tree.disclaimer: This tool provides general information and does not constitute legal advice.

rinnovareConvertire.welcomeTitle: A few questions to find out how to <hl>renew</hl> or <hl>convert</hl> your residence permit

outcome.disclaimer: This information is for guidance only and does not constitute legal advice. For an assessment of your specific case, consult a lawyer or legal aid office.
outcome.lawyerRecommended: It is better to consult a legal expert
outcome.readFullGuide: Read the full guide on SOSpermesso

common.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

segnalaErrore.title: Report an error
segnalaErrore.intro: Help us improve by reporting errors, inaccuracies, or technical problems.
segnalaErrore.tipoLabel: What kind of error did you find?
segnalaErrore.dovePlaceholder: e.g. Work permit page, link in the menu...
segnalaErrore.descrizioneLabel: Describe the error (and, if you can, the correct version)
segnalaErrore.descrizionePlaceholder: The more detail you give, the faster we can fix it
segnalaErrore.emailHelp: Only if you want a reply
segnalaErrore.successMessage: Your report has been sent. Thanks for helping us improve!

problemaLegale.title: I have a legal problem
problemaLegale.intro: Tell us your situation. We do not provide legal advice but we will try to point you to the right support.
problemaLegale.situazione_ha_permesso: I already have a permit and I have a problem
problemaLegale.situazione_non_so: I do not know which permit I can apply for
problemaLegale.situazione_diniego: I received a refusal or have a problem with the questura
problemaLegale.descrizionePlaceholder: Explain the situation as much as possible
problemaLegale.tempoItaliaLabel: How long have you been in Italy? (optional)
problemaLegale.consensoLabel: I consent to the processing of my data to receive a reply
problemaLegale.successMessage: Your request has been sent. We will contact you by email as soon as possible.
problemaLegale.disclaimer: We do not provide binding legal advice. For urgent cases, contact a lawyer or a legal aid office.

contribuisci.title: I want to contribute to the project
contribuisci.intro: Tell us how you would like to help SOSpermesso.
contribuisci.comeLabel: How do you want to contribute?
contribuisci.come_legale: I am a lawyer or legal worker
contribuisci.come_donazione: I would like to support the project financially
contribuisci.come_comunicazione: I can help with outreach and communication
contribuisci.raccontaciPlaceholder: Who you are, what you do, why you want to contribute
contribuisci.consensoLabel: I consent to the processing of my data to be contacted
contribuisci.successMessage: Thank you! We will be in touch soon.
